Canvas Library Interactive Tests

Click a library to open its interactive canvas fixture. All interactions are on the shapes directly — no buttons.

1. Fabric.js
red-rect, blue-circle — drag, handles to rotate/resize, scroll to scale
2. Konva
purple-rect, orange-circle — drag, handles to rotate/resize, scroll to scale
3. PixiJS
green-rect, orange-circle — drag, shift+drag rotate, scroll to scale
4. Three.js
green-cube, red-sphere — drag, shift+drag rotate, scroll to scale, right-drag orbit
5. EaselJS
teal-rect, magenta-circle — drag, shift+drag rotate, scroll to scale
6. Phaser
violet-rect, lime-circle — drag, shift+drag rotate, scroll to scale
7. Raw Canvas
gray-rect, brown-circle — drag, shift+drag rotate, scroll to scale
